evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(3000);try{MOS.nav('config')}catch(e){}await w(2000);const r={vw:window.innerWidth};const lbls=[...document.querySelectorAll('.bnav-lbl')];r.navLabels=lbls.map(l=>({txt:l.textContent,truncado:l.scrollWidth>l.clientWidth+1,fs:getComputedStyle(l).fontSize}));r.bnavOverflow=(()=>{const bn=document.querySelector('.bnav-inner');return bn?bn.scrollWidth>bn.clientWidth+1:null})();r.docOverflow=document.documentElement.scrollWidth>window.innerWidth+1;r.zoomPermitido=!document.querySelector('meta[name=viewport]').content.includes('maximum-scale');return r;})()
